nemo_retriever.params.chunk_bundle module#

nemo_retriever.params.models module#

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.ASRParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ASRParams",
   "description": "Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "audio_endpoints": {
         "default": [
            null,
            null
         ],
         "maxItems": 2,
         "minItems": 2,
         "prefixItems": [
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            },
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            }
         ],
         "title": "Audio Endpoints",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "audio_infer_protocol": {
         "default": "grpc",
         "title": "Audio Infer Protocol",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "function_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Function Id"
      },
      "auth_token": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Auth Token"
      },
      "segment_audio": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Segment Audio",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_endpoints (Tuple[Optional[str], Optional[str]])

  • audio_infer_protocol (str)

  • auth_token (Optional[str])

  • function_id (Optional[str])

  • segment_audio (bool)

field audio_endpoints: Tuple[str | None, str | None] = (None, None)#
field audio_infer_protocol: str = 'grpc'#
field auth_token: str | None = None#
field function_id: str | None = None#
field segment_audio: bool = False#
pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.AudioChunkParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nv-ingest-api dataloader.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "AudioChunkParams",
   "description": "Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nv-ingest-api dataloader.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "split_type": {
         "default": "size",
         "enum": [
            "size",
            "time",
            "frame"
         ],
         "title": "Split Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "split_interval": {
         "default": 450,
         "title": "Split Interval",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "audio_only": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Audio Only",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "video_audio_separate": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Video Audio Separate",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_only (bool)

  • split_interval (int)

  • split_type (Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'])

  • video_audio_separate (bool)

field audio_only: bool = False#
field split_interval: int = 450#
field split_type: Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'] = 'size'#
field video_audio_separate: bool = False#

{
   "title": "BatchTuningParams",

         "title": "Embed Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"

      "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
         "default": 1,
         "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
         "type": "number"

      "gpu_page_elements": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"

               "type": "null"
            }

         "default": null,

         "default": 0.0,
         "title": "Nemotron Parse Batch Size",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      }

   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.ChartParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ChartParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },
            "api_key": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 120.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 10,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • inference_batch_size (int)

  • remote (nemo_retriever.params.models.RemoteInvokeParams)

  • remote_retry (nemo_retriever.params.models.RemoteRetryParams)

field remote: RemoteInvokeParams [Optional]#
field remote_retry: RemoteRetryParams [Optional]#

         "default": 32,

         "additionalProperties": false,

               "default": "unknown",

            "pdf_split_batch_size": {

         },
         "title": "ModelRuntimeParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "extract_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_images": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Images",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_tables": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Tables",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_charts": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_page_as_image": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image"
      },
      "method": {
         "default": "pdfium",
         "title": "Method",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "use_table_structure": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Table Structure",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "table_output_format": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "pseudo_markdown",
                  "markdown"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Output Format"
      },
      "use_graphic_elements": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Graphic Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dpi": {
         "default": 200,
         "title": "Dpi",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "image_format": {
         "default": "jpeg",
         "title": "Image Format",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "jpeg_quality": {
         "default": 100,
         "title": "Jpeg Quality",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "render_mode": {
         "default": "fit_to_model",
         "enum": [
            "full_dpi",
            "fit_to_model"
         ],
         "title": "Render Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,

         "type": "integer"
      },
      "ocr_model_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }

         "default": null,

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "request_timeout_s": {
         "default": 120.0,
         "title": "Request Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "page_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

               "type": "number"
            },
            {

            }
         ],
         "default": null,

      "ocr_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Invoke Url"
      },
      "ocr_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"

         "default": null,

               "type": "null"

         ],
         "default": null,

      },

         "default": "page_elements_v3",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {

      },

         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }

   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_num_cpus": {
               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "pdf_extract_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Inference Batch Size"
            },
            "page_elements_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Page Elements Workers"
            },
            "ocr_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Workers"
            },
            "detect_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Detect Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "ocr_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Ocr Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "embed_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Embed Workers"
            },
            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 256,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_page_elements": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Page Elements"
            },
            "gpu_ocr": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Ocr"

            "gpu_embed": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Embed"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_workers": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Workers",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_nemotron_parse": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Gpu Nemotron Parse",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_batch_size": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Batch Size",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "inference_batch_size": {
               "default": 8,
               "title": "Inference Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "BatchTuningParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 10,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false

      }
   },

}

               "default": true,
               "title": "Overwrite",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "create_index": {
               "default": true,
               "title": "Create Index",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "index_type": {
               "default": "IVF_HNSW_SQ",
               "title": "Index Type",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "metric": {
               "default": "l2",
               "title": "Metric",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "num_partitions": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Num Partitions",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "num_sub_vectors": {
               "default": 256,
               "title": "Num Sub Vectors",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embedding_column": {
               "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
               "title": "Embedding Column",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "embedding_key": {
               "default": "embedding",
               "title": "Embedding Key",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "include_text": {
               "default": true,
               "title": "Include Text",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "text_column": {
               "default": "text",
               "title": "Text Column",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "hybrid": {
               "default": false,
               "title": "Hybrid",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "fts_language": {
               "default": "English",
               "title": "Fts Language",
               "type": "string"
            }
         },
         "title": "LanceDbParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • lancedb (nemo_retriever.params.models.LanceDbParams)

  • purge_results_after_upload (bool)

field lancedb: LanceDbParams [Optional]#
field purge_results_after_upload: bool = True#

nemo_retriever.params.utils module#

Shared parameter coercion and building helpers used by ingest modes.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.build_embed_kwargs(
resolved: Any,
*,
include_batch_tuning: bool = False,
) → Dict[str, Any][source]#

Flatten an EmbedParams instance into a dict ready for actor/task kwargs.

Merges runtime (always) and optionally batch_tuning sub-models. Also normalises embed_invoke_url → embedding_endpoint.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.coerce_params(
params: T | None,
model_cls: type[T],
kwargs: dict[str, Any],
) → T[source]#

Merge params and kwargs into an instance of model_cls.

  • If params is None, construct from kwargs.

  • If kwargs is non-empty, apply them as overrides via model_copy.

  • Otherwise return params unchanged.

Module contents#

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.ASRParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ASRParams",
   "description": "Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "audio_endpoints": {
         "default": [
            null,
            null
         ],
         "maxItems": 2,
         "minItems": 2,
         "prefixItems": [
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            },
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            }
         ],
         "title": "Audio Endpoints",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "audio_infer_protocol": {
         "default": "grpc",
         "title": "Audio Infer Protocol",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "function_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Function Id"
      },
      "auth_token": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Auth Token"
      },
      "segment_audio": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Segment Audio",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nv-ingest-api dataloader.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "AudioChunkParams",
   "description": "Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nv-ingest-api dataloader.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "split_type": {
         "default": "size",
         "enum": [
            "size",
            "time",
            "frame"
         ],
         "title": "Split Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "split_interval": {
         "default": 450,
         "title": "Split Interval",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "audio_only": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Audio Only",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "video_audio_separate": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Video Audio Separate",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ChartParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },
            "api_key": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 120.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 10,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

  • extra: str = forbid

            "pdf_split_batch_size": {

               "type": "integer"

         },
         "title": "ModelRuntimeParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.ExtractParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "extract_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_images": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Images",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_tables": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Tables",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_charts": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_page_as_image": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image"
      },
      "method": {
         "default": "pdfium",
         "title": "Method",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "use_table_structure": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Table Structure",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "table_output_format": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "pseudo_markdown",
                  "markdown"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Output Format"
      },
      "use_graphic_elements": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Graphic Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dpi": {
         "default": 200,
         "title": "Dpi",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "image_format": {
         "default": "jpeg",
         "title": "Image Format",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "jpeg_quality": {
         "default": 100,
         "title": "Jpeg Quality",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "render_mode": {
         "default": "fit_to_model",
         "enum": [
            "full_dpi",
            "fit_to_model"
         ],
         "title": "Render Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "ocr_model_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Model Dir"
      },
      "invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Invoke Url"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "request_timeout_s": {
         "default": 120.0,
         "title": "Request Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "page_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Invoke Url"
      },
      "page_elements_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Api Key"
      },
      "page_elements_request_timeout_s": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Request Timeout S"
      },
      "ocr_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Invoke Url"
      },
      "ocr_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Api Key"
      },
      "ocr_request_timeout_s": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Request Timeout S"
      },
      "graphic_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Graphic Elements Invoke Url"
      },
      "table_structure_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Structure Invoke Url"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "batch_tuning": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_num_cpus": {
               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "pdf_extract_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Inference Batch Size"
            },
            "page_elements_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Page Elements Workers"
            },
            "ocr_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Workers"
            },
            "detect_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Detect Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "ocr_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Ocr Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "embed_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Embed Workers"
            },
            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 256,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_page_elements": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Page Elements"
            },
            "gpu_ocr": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Ocr"
            },
            "gpu_embed": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Embed"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_workers": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Workers",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_nemotron_parse": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Gpu Nemotron Parse",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_batch_size": {
               "default": 0.0,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Batch Size",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "inference_batch_size": {
               "default": 8,
               "title": "Inference Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "BatchTuningParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 10,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "InfographicParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "allowed_page_element_labels": {
         "default": [
            "infographic",
            "title"
         ],
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Allowed Page Element Labels",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },

               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 120.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 10,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {

      }

}

            },
            "num_partitions": {
               "default": 16,
               "title": "Num Partitions",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "num_sub_vectors": {
               "default": 256,
               "title": "Num Sub Vectors",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embedding_column": {
               "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
               "title": "Embedding Column",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "embedding_key": {
               "default": "embedding",
               "title": "Embedding Key",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "include_text": {
               "default": true,
               "title": "Include Text",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "text_column": {
               "default": "text",
               "title": "Text Column",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "hybrid": {
               "default": false,
               "title": "Hybrid",
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            "fts_language": {
               "default": "English",
               "title": "Fts Language",
               "type": "string"
            }
         },
         "title": "LanceDbParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • lancedb (LanceDbParams)

  • purge_results_after_upload (bool)

field lancedb: LanceDbParams [Optional]#
field purge_results_after_upload: bool = True#
